management_guidance.revenue: $91.0 billion, plus or minus 2% for Q2 FY2027
management_guidance.gross_margin: GAAP 74.9% and non-GAAP 75.0%, plus or minus 50 basis points for Q2 FY2027
management_guidance.operating_expenses: GAAP approximately $8.5 billion and non-GAAP approximately $8.3 billion for Q2 FY2027
management_guidance.tax_rate: Full year FY2027 GAAP and non-GAAP tax rates expected to be between 16.0% and 18.0%, excluding discrete items
management_guidance.qualitative: No Data Center compute revenue from China assumed in Q2 FY2027 outlook; DSO expected to return to more normal levels next quarter; substantial increase in cash taxes expected in Q2 related to estimated federal and state payments

key_risks: No shipments of Data Center Hopper products to China occurred during Q1 FY27 (vs. $4.6 billion in Q1 FY26), with no China Data Center compute revenue assumed going forward

top_quotes.speaker: CFO / Management
top_quotes.quote: Revenue for the first quarter was a record $81.6 billion, up 85% from a year ago and up 20% sequentially.

top_quotes.speaker: CFO / Management
top_quotes.quote: Data Center revenue for the first quarter was a record $75.2 billion, up 92% from a year ago and up 21% sequentially, driven by the ramp of our Blackwell 300 products and demand for our InfiniBand, Spectrum-X Ethernet, and NVLink solutions.

top_quotes.speaker: CFO / Management
top_quotes.quote: On May 18, 2026, our Board of Directors approved an increase to our quarterly dividend from $0.01 per share to $0.25 per share and an additional $80.0 billion to our share repurchase authorization, without expiration.
